text: Precision matters a lot to me — I want every word to be doing real work, and I can't stand vague or ambiguous phrasing in academic writing. I also care deeply about formal register and logical flow, so each paragraph should feel like it follows necessarily from the last rather than just appearing in sequence. And since I write research papers, I'm always thinking about where references will eventually land, so I try to leave that scaffolding in place even in early drafts.
